---
title: "Monocyte_Barplots"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-15"
---

## 0. Libraries and paths

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# install.packages(c("ggpubr", "rstatix", "patchwork"))
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(patchwork)
library(ggbreak)

spss_path <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/data/Diagnosis_data/bbddtfg_NataliaCongreso.sav"
out_dir   <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/Descriptive/Monocytes"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

```

---

## 1. Load and prepare data

```{r prepare}

df_raw <- read_sav(spss_path)

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Diagnosis = factor(as.numeric(GRUPO),
                       levels = c(0, 1, 2),
                       labels = c("OCD", "Tourette", "ASD"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Average technical duplicates
    Monocytes_pct    = rowMeans(cbind(as.numeric(Monocytes1),
                                       as.numeric(Monocytes2)),
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
    CD16pos_pct      = rowMeans(cbind(as.numeric(CD16pos1),
                                       as.numeric(CD16pos2)),
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
    Classical_pct    = rowMeans(cbind(as.numeric(Classical1),
                                       as.numeric(Classical2)),
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
    Intermediate_pct = rowMeans(cbind(as.numeric(Intermediate1),
                                       as.numeric(Intermediate2)),
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
    Nonclassical_pct = rowMeans(cbind(as.numeric(Nonclassical1),
                                       as.numeric(Nonclassical2)),
                                 na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Check value ranges — helps identify if Totalmonocytes is the issue
message("Value ranges after averaging duplicates:")
vars_check <- c("Monocytes_pct", "CD16pos_pct",
                "Classical_pct", "Intermediate_pct", "Nonclassical_pct")
for (v in vars_check) {
  vals <- df[[v]]
  message(sprintf("  %-22s  min=%5.1f  median=%5.1f  max=%5.1f  NA=%d",
                  v,
                  min(vals,    na.rm = TRUE),
                  median(vals, na.rm = TRUE),
                  max(vals,    na.rm = TRUE),
                  sum(is.na(vals))))
}

```

---

## 2. Reshape to long format

```{r reshape}

df_long <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(CODIGO, Diagnosis, all_of(vars_check)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = -c(CODIGO, Diagnosis),
    names_to  = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = factor(Variable,
      levels = vars_check,
      labels = c(
        "Total monocytes\n(% leukocytes)",
        "CD16+ monocytes\n(%)",
        "Classical\n(%)",
        "Intermediate\n(%)",
        "Non-classical\n(%)"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Value))

```

---

## 3. Statistical tests

```{r stats}

# Kruskal-Wallis per variable
kw_results <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  kruskal_test(Value ~ Diagnosis) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance()

message("Kruskal-Wallis results:")
print(kw_results %>%
        dplyr::select(Variable, statistic, df, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Dunn post-hoc pairwise
dunn_results <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  dunn_test(Value ~ Diagnosis, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "Diagnosis")

```

---

## 4. Plot function

```{r plot_function}

diag_colors <- c(
  "OCD"      = "#191970",
  "Tourette" = "#f4a460",
  "ASD"      = "#b03060"
)

make_barplot <- function(var_label) {

  df_var <- df_long %>% filter(Variable == var_label)

  # Detect outlier threshold — Q3 + 3*IQR
  q75   <- quantile(df_var$Value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr   <- IQR(df_var$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  upper <- q75 + 3 * iqr
  has_outliers <- any(df_var$Value > upper, na.rm = TRUE)

  # If outliers present, define break points
  # Lower range: 0 to just above the bulk of data (95th percentile)
  # Upper range: just below the outlier to max
  p95   <- quantile(df_var$Value, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_v <- max(df_var$Value, na.rm = TRUE)

  df_sum <- df_var %>%
    group_by(Diagnosis) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_val = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      se_val   = sd(Value,   na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
      n        = n(),
      .groups  = "drop"
    )

  kw_p     <- kw_results %>% filter(Variable == var_label) %>% pull(p)
  kw_label <- paste0("KW p = ", signif(kw_p, 3))
  dunn_var <- dunn_results %>% filter(Variable == var_label, p.adj < 0.05 )
#, p.adj < 0.05
  p <- ggplot(df_sum,
              aes(x = Diagnosis, y = mean_val, fill = Diagnosis)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_val - se_val,
                      ymax = mean_val + se_val),
                  width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.7, color = "grey30") +
    geom_jitter(data  = df_var,
                aes(x = Diagnosis, y = Value),
                shape = 21, size = 1.8, alpha = 0.55,
                fill  = "white", color = "grey40",
                width = 0.12) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = diag_colors, guide = "none") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    labs(
      title    = as.character(var_label),
      subtitle = kw_label,
      x        = NULL,
      y        = "Mean \u00B1 SE (%)"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey40", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    )

  # Apply axis break only when outliers detected
  if (has_outliers) {
    break_lower <- p95 * 1.15   # top of lower range
    break_upper <- max_v * 0.85 # bottom of upper range
    p <- p +
      scale_y_break(
        breaks    = c(break_lower, break_upper),
        scales    = 0.3,          # upper segment smaller
        ticklabels = TRUE,
        space     = 0.08
      )
  }

  if (nrow(dunn_var) > 0) {
    p <- p +
      stat_pvalue_manual(
        dunn_var,
        label      = "p.adj.signif",      #.SIGNIF
        tip.length = 0.01,
        size       = 3.5,
        hide.ns    = TRUE    #true
      )
  }

  p
}

```

---

## 5. Generate and save plots

```{r generate_plots}

var_labels <- levels(df_long$Variable)

plots <- setNames(
  lapply(var_labels, make_barplot),
  var_labels
)

# Individual plots
for (v in var_labels) {
  fname <- paste0(gsub("[^A-Za-z]", "_", v), ".png")
  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, fname),
         plots[[v]], width = 4, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  message("Saved: ", fname)
}

# Combined panel
p_panel <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Monocyte populations by diagnosis",
    subtitle = paste0("Mean ± SE  |  Individual values shown  |  ",
                      "Kruskal-Wallis + Dunn post-hoc (BH correction)  |  ",
                      "Brackets: p.adj < 0.05"),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "Monocyte_panel_all.png"),
  p_panel,
  width  = 14,
  height = 10,
  dpi    = 300
)
message("Panel figure saved.")

```

---

## 6. Summary table

```{r summary_table}

summary_tbl <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Variable, Diagnosis) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = n(),
    Mean   = round(mean(Value), 2),
    SD     = round(sd(Value),   2),
    Median = round(median(Value), 2),
    IQR    = round(IQR(Value),  2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(summary_tbl,
          file.path(out_dir, "Monocyte_summary_by_diagnosis.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
message("Summary table saved.")
print(summary_tbl)

# Also print KW results
message("\nKruskal-Wallis + BH correction:")
print(kw_results %>% dplyr::select(Variable, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

```
